_meta.description: Parameter Golf competition submission DAG. Nodes are PRs/submissions, edges show derivation (builds_on). Techniques are tagged.

PR65.title: SmearGate + OrthoInit + MuonWD + Int6 STE QAT + MLP3x
PR65.author: aquariouseworkman
PR65.note: Foundational PR — SmearGate+BigramHash adopted by all subsequent records

PR156.title: Int6 STE + NorMuon + SWA + Sliding Window
PR156.author: dexhunter

PR162.title: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + MuonWD + SWA
PR162.author: raahilshah
PR162.note: Tuned WD to 0.04. SWA introduced. raahilshah also later built Full GPTQ (PR535).

PR167.title: Depth Recurrence via Layer Sharing (3 shared blocks)
PR167.author: SkywardSyntax

PR198.title: 11L Efficient Partial XSA + FA3 + SWA
PR198.author: unnir
PR198.note: Introduced XSA with efficient GQA-aware implementation

PR287.title: 11L XSA4 + EMA + Int6 MLP3x
PR287.author: jfprincz
PR287.note: EMA replaces SWA. XSA extended to last 4 layers.

PR315.title: 11L Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + XSA4
PR315.author: jfprincz
PR315.note: Two zero-param tricks. Late QAT was dead code (torch.compile bug).

PR352.title: Memory Tokens + Mixed Quantization
PR352.author: sp00mm
PR352.note: 64 learnable vectors as global context. -0.014 BPB.

PR363.title: Depth Recurrence in Parameter-Constrained Transformers
PR363.author: evangelinehelsinki
PR363.note: NON-RECORD. Key finding: SmearGate HURTS looped architectures. Quantization error propagates through loops.

PR374.title: 11L + Tight SWA + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + XSA4
PR374.author: unnir
PR374.note: Introduced VE128 (shared value embeddings) and Tight SWA (only last ~600 steps).

PR399.title: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking
PR399.author: abaybektursun
PR399.note: Newton-Schulz 19.7ms→1.3ms (15x faster). +190 steps/600s. DDP incompatible — custom comm scheduling.

PR414.title: 11L EMA + GPTQ-lite + warmdown3500 + QAT@0.15
PR414.author: signalrush
PR414.note: GPTQ-lite: 5 clip percentiles per row. -0.0006 BPB. Key quantization paper.

PR461.title: 11L Depth Recurrence + High-Yield Legal TTT
PR461.author: Christopher-Lee-McClendon
PR461.note: NON-RECORD. Introduced the legal TTT recipe (score-first, SGD not AdamW, 3 epochs). TTT gain: -0.0165 BPB.

PR478.title: 11L XSA-all(11) + GPTQ-lite + EMA + Late QAT
PR478.author: gowtham0992
PR478.note: Extended XSA to all 11 layers. -0.006 BPB total vs XSA-4.

PR493.title: 11L EMA + Int6 + XSA + LeakyReLU²
PR493.author: parinzee
PR493.note: NON-RECORD. Introduced LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation. -0.003 BPB. One-line change.

PR535.title: 11L LeakyReLU² + Full GPTQ + QAT Alignment
PR535.author: raahilshah
PR535.note: Introduced Full Hessian GPTQ. Calibrated on training data — later ruled must be within 600s budget.

PR549.title: LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon
PR549.author: abaybektursun
PR549.note: Integration of 4 PRs. TTT: -0.015 BPB. LeakyReLU²: -0.003 BPB. 25+ TTT variants tested.

PR557.title: Batched LoRA TTT
PR557.author: hypery11
PR557.note: Rank-8 LoRA on Q,V,LM head. 64 docs parallel. -0.0316 BPB. 8.3min eval.

PR609.title: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning
PR609.author: saml212
PR609.note: NON-RECORD. Reclassified due to GPTQ calibration timing. 15 documented dead ends.

PR640.title: 73.7M Ternary U-Net
PR640.author: CiprianFlorin-Ifrim
PR640.note: Completely independent architecture. 250+ experiments. Ternary beats binary at 10min; binary wins with more compute.

PR660.title: Soft MoE
PR660.author: HugoOchoaLP
PR660.note: Sparse MoE collapsed (98/2 split). Soft MoE fixes via dense gating. Over budget at 17.3MB.

PR875.title: Gated DeltaNet (GDN)
PR875.author: shalyhinpavel
PR875.note: INVALID. 5 confirmed bugs. Claimed 1.0226 BPB is meaningless.

PR989.title: QAT x SWA Ablation
PR989.author: alexanderaperry-arch
PR989.note: KEY FINDING: SWA sabotages QAT (-3.64 mBPB). Don't combine them.

PR992.title: First H-Net with Dynamic Sequence Chunking
PR992.author: TimS-ml
PR992.note: First H-Net submission from README wishlist.

PR1019.title: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072×112
PR1019.author: abaybektursun
PR1019.note: CURRENT MERGED SOTA. AR self-gen closes 84% of val-vs-random gap. TTT dropped after 25+ failed attempts on this stack.

PR1394.author: clarkkev

key_negative_results.finding: TTT and GPTQ are fundamentally incompatible
Sub-1.0 Scylla claims were measurement errors
Codebook quantization, magnitude pruning, multi-token prediction, embedding factorization — all negative
TrigramHash improves raw BPB but hurts compression (net negative)
Extended context eval catastrophically fails (RoPE breaks past training length)
Value Residual Learning conflicts with VE128
SwiGLU: 45% slower per step, net negative in 10 min budget
Combining PRs naively can regress (3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals conflicted)
